# AlphaSMB

> AlphaSMB is an AI transformation consultancy for SMBs (20-500 employees).
> Founded by Zach Henderson, who leads AI transformation inside Aurora WDC.
> The primary entry point is a free AI Readiness Assessment — a 15-question
> diagnostic scored across mindset, skillset, and toolset with a personalized
> report. The methodology builds organizational AI capability, not just tool adoption.

## Key Pages

- [Home](https://alphasmb.com/): Value proposition, methodology, service tiers
- [AI Readiness Assessment](https://alphasmb.com/assessment): Free 5-minute diagnostic — 15 questions, instant score, personalized report. No email required to start.
- [AI Strategy Call](https://alphasmb.com/services/strategy-call): $500 one-hour session — readiness assessment, benchmarking, transformation roadmap, execution scorecard, 48-hour action plan
- [About Zach Henderson](https://alphasmb.com/about): Credentials, philosophy, Aurora WDC role
- [Book a Call](https://alphasmb.com/book): Schedule and pay ($500 via Cal.com + Stripe)
- [Privacy Policy](https://alphasmb.com/privacy): Data handling for assessment, booking, analytics

## About the Founder

Zach Henderson — Fractional Head of AI at Aurora WDC (a human intelligence
agency serving Fortune 1000 clients). Leads AI transformation inside the
company: internal tooling, process automation, AI product features. Prior:
Epic Systems, healthcare IT consulting, 20+ years real estate investing,
industrial engineering, built product companies.

## Services

AI Readiness Assessment (free): 15-question diagnostic scored across mindset,
skillset, and toolset. Instant results with personalized report delivered via
email. Primary entry point for the consulting funnel.

One-Hour AI Strategy Call ($500): Deep-dive assessment, industry benchmarking,
three-phase transformation roadmap, execution scorecard, 48-hour action plan.
Delivered as a shareable report. Traditional AI consulting starts north of $50K.

Full Transformation Engagement (custom pricing): Up to 3 months embedded with
the organization. Champion identification, phased change management, weekly
benchmarking. Limited to 2 clients at a time.

## Methodology

Four-phase approach: (1) Mindset first — leadership must think differently
about AI before anything changes below them. (2) Find the champion — identify
the person the organization already listens to and turn them into an AI
transformation catalyst. (3) Activate high-agency people — surface proactive
employees and give them tools and methods to lead from within. (4) Measure
what matters — weekly scoring against industry benchmarks.
